_comment: Daily slate TEMPLATE — data, not code. server/tools/daily-loop.mjs stamps q_ids with the date and fills resolve_at at publish time. Sources must be auto-resolvable (coingecko:<id>, rule close>=open).

questions.text: Will Bitcoin (BTC/USD) close this slate at or above its price at slate open?
Will Ethereum (ETH/USD) close this slate at or above its price at slate open?
Will Solana (SOL/USD) close this slate at or above its price at slate open?
